description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure with a modern, open-plan layout and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious patio and pool area. The backyard features a wooden pergola and a blue swimming pool, while the front includes a paved driveway and a small green lawn. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including bedrooms, a living area, kitchen, and bathrooms, all arranged around a central corridor. The use of glass and open spaces allows for ample natural light throughout the home. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and an open-plan layout featuring a patio, pool, and pergola. The design highlights clean lines and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, and a glimpse into the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the large blue bedroom, multiple interior rooms, and the extended length of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden pergola, swimming pool, and sliding glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the patio, green lawn, and the overall elongated structure of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped side windows
